text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Plan Characteristics (2007-2014) │ October 2021 │ V 1.4 
218 
OTC_UM_PROGRAM 
LABEL: 
Plan Covers Over-the-Counter medications (OTCs) under the Utilization Management Program 
DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates whether or not the Part D plan pays for Over-the-Counter medications (OTCs) 
under its Utilization Management (UM) Program. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: OTC_UM_PROGRAM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS Files) 
VALUES: 
Y
